Class DSEvent<T>

Namespace
WolverineSoft.DialogueSystem

abstract class for Scriptable Object representing a typed Dialogue Event

Invoke(DialogueManager, T)

Invoke Event for all global listeners. Listeners assigned with a manager will only be called if the provided manager matches
